revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八幡神社 (徳島市)]]
{{otheruses|A Shinto shrine in Iga Town, Tokushima City|A Shinto shrine in Shibuno Town, Tokushima City|{{ill|Hachiman Shrine (Tokushima City, Shibuno)|ja|八幡神社 (徳島市渋野町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Shrine (Tokushima City, Shibuno)|qq=}}}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Hachiman Shrine |image = File:Haciman Jinja Tokushima City.jpg |location = {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}, [[:en:Tokushima City|Tokushima City]], {{ill|Iga Town (Tokushima City)|ja|伊賀町 (徳島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iga Town (Tokushima City)|1=Igachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11380671}} 1-7-1 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|3|57.12|N|134|32|38.74|E|display=inline,title}} |deity = {{ill|Ōjin|qid=Q317997|1=Emperor Ōjin}} |type = Former Gō-sha Shrine |創建 = [[Genroku]] 10 (1697), [[June 15]] |本殿 = |別名 = Tomiura Hachiman-gū |festival = November 3 |神事 = |location = {{ill|Tokushima|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}} |coordinates = {{Coord|34.0658667|N|134.5440944|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }}
'''Hachiman Shrine''' (八幡神社) is a Shinto shrine located in [[:en:Tokushima City|Tokushima City]], {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|qid=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}, Japan. It is situated at the base of {{ill|Mount Bizan|en|Mount Bizan|qid=Q8189109|lt=Bizan|1=Mount Bizan}}.
== History ==
Originally enshrined in {{ill|Kōno-no-Sato|ja|河野郷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōno-no-Sato|1=河野郷|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11554280}} in {{ill|Iyo Province|en|Iyo Province|qid=Q907829|lt=Iyo Province|1=Iyo Province}} (modern-day {{ill|Matsuyama|en|Matsuyama|qid=Q200022|lt=Matsuyama|1=Matsuyama}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|en|Ehime Prefecture|qid=Q123376|lt=Ehime Prefecture|1=Ehime Prefecture}}), the tutelary deity was transferred to [[Awa Province]] during the [[Tenmon]] era. In 1602 (Keichō 7), the shrine was moved to its current location in conjunction with the establishment of {{ill|Zuigan-ji (Tokushima City)|ja|瑞巌寺 (徳島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zuigan-ji (Tokushima City)|1=Zuigan-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11573879}}. According to the {{ill|Awa-shi|ja|阿波志|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Awa-shi|qq=}}, the shrine once held a territory of 200,000 koku. The *Kanpo Shrine Registry* notes, “Tomiura Hachiman-gū, Priest Tomita, Sōun Saimiya.”
In 1873 (Meiji 6), the shrine was designated a Gōsha shrine but became a religious corporation following World War II, losing its official Rank.
== Festivals ==
* First Kagura Festival – January 15 * Summer Festival – July 3
== Subsidiary Shrines ==
* Ie Shrine * Water Shrine * Inari Shrine * Dragon Shrine * Awa Tanuki Shrine
== Cultural Properties ==
* '''Zuijin Gate''' – Designated as a Tokushima City Cultural Property. This mid-{{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}} structure is a single-story gate with a three-bay, one-opening design and a gabled roof. The main hall was destroyed by a suspicious fire in November 1967 (Shōwa 42) and was reconstructed in April 1987 (Shōwa 62).
== Central Five Shrines of Tokushima ==
* {{ill|Suwa Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|諏訪神社 (徳島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa Shrine (Tokushima City)|qq=}} - Located in Minamisako, Tokushima City * {{ill|Kasuga Shrine (Tokushima)|ja|春日神社 (徳島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kasuga Shrine (Tokushima City)|qq=}} - Located on Mount Bizan, Tokushima City * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Tokushima)|ja|四所神社 (徳島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shisho Shrine (Tokushima City)|qq=}} - Located in Fukushima, Tokushima City * {{ill|Konpira Shrine (Tokushima)|ja|金刀比羅神社 (徳島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kotohira Shrine (Tokushima City)|qq=}} - Located in Semimachi, Tokushima City
== Access ==
* Approximately a 15-minute walk from {{ill|Awa-Tomida Station|en|Awa-Tomida Station|qid=Q4829621|lt=Awa-Tomida Station|1=Awa-Tomida Station}} on the JR {{ill|Mugi Line|en|Mugi Line|qid=Q860478|lt=Mugi Line|1=Mugi Line}}.
== Related Articles ==
* {{ill|Hachiman shrine|en|Hachiman shrine|qid=Q11390939|lt=Hachiman Shrine|1=Hachiman shrine}} * {{ill|Mishima Shrine (Tokushima City)|ja|三島神社 (徳島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mishima Shrine (Tokushima City)|1=Mishima Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11355277}}
{{shinto-stub}}
